name: 20.78" x 24.78" Matted to 16" x 20" Thin Poster Frame Brass - Room Essentials™: Styrene Glazed, Wall Mountable
description: Display family portraits, vacation photos or artwork in eye-catching style with this Thin Poster Frame from Room Essentials™. This single photo picture frame has a clean-lined look you're sure to love — styrene glazing keeps your photograph protected, and the frame in faux metal brass finish goes great with any style of decor. Plus, it provides a great deal of versatility since it can be displayed either horizontally or vertically so you can create the display that works for your space.
